scope: active repos (skip: Tracera, AgilePlus, PhenoDocs, Helios*, Chatta, Kaskman, AtomsBot)
method: read-only pattern scan ~230 repos; signals: migrations dir, sqlx tx, deleted_at, audit_log, argon2, EventStore, backup, encrypt-at-rest
summary: L12 maturity LOW and uneven. ~75% of persistence-bearing repos lack migrations, soft-delete, audit, encryption-at-rest. Only OmniRoute meets full baseline. Planify downgraded to 1/5 (prior soft_delete hits were coincidental page-event matches, not DB columns). Event-sourcing/CQRS ad-hoc (FocalPoint, PhenoObservability, pheno-pydantic-models); no aggregate/event-store anywhere. Forward+backward migration discipline absent; no rollback tests. Backup scripts exist (5 repos) but no restore-drill. PII hashing in 8 repos; redaction/masking absent. Encryption-at-rest: OmniRoute only.

repos.notes: Reference: src/lib/db/migrations/*.sql, deleted_at in files.ts, 104 audit refs, cli-backup-sync skill, encrypt-at-rest in credentials.ts
56-crate Rust ws; audit_chain + event log in focus-ffi/rules/sync; focus-backup crate; no migr dir
crates/infra/migrations + sqlx tx in pg.rs; no soft-delete/audit/encrypt
agileplus-sqlite/migrations + audit in storage.rs; no soft-delete/encrypt
db_kit migrations + supabase client; no trx/audit
questdb event-stream + cqrs-adjacent; no tx store, no backup drill
DTO/aggregate + hash validators; no runtime DB
Pure data; read/write split; no persistence
Plugin log + PII redaction helpers; no DB
Planify downgraded: soft_delete hits were event names not DB columns; no prisma/audit_log/migr

gaps_top5: 1. No tested forward+backward migration discipline; migr dirs exist (OmniRoute, Civis, Pyron, DataKit) but no rollback tests in CI.
2. Encryption-at-rest is OmniRoute-only; Civis/Pyron/AuthKit/PhenoKits/FocalPoint store PII/secrets in plaintext SQLite/Postgres.
3. Soft-delete is OmniRoute-only; rest of fleet hard-deletes (audit irrecoverable). Planify downgraded to 1/5.
4. Event-sourcing ad-hoc — no aggregate root, no event-store, no snapshot versioning in any repo.
5. Backup scripts exist (5 repos) but no restore-drill in CI; PITR/CDC absent.
recommended_actions: Adopt OmniRoute L12 baseline (migrations + soft_delete + audit + backup + encrypt) as org reference.
Add `deleted_at` to Civis/Pyron/FocalPoint/AuthKit models (~4 repos, 6-10 tool calls each).
Promote pheno-pydantic-models + pheno-zod-schemas to shared schema-kits for typed migrations.
Add `sqlx-migrate` rollback test in CI for all 4 repos with migr dirs.
Bundle encryption-at-rest helper into PhenoKits as `pheno-kits/encrypt` crate.
provenance: read-only pattern scan; no file edits, no git ops, parent bash only
